name: RTL Support
description: Automatic Right-to-Left (RTL) text direction detection for agent transcripts, prompts, and markdown content. Resolves issue #237.
author: milad-abdi

rtlSupport.enabled.description: Enable automatic RTL/LTR text direction detection.

rtlSupport.mode.description: Direction mode: 'auto' detects per block based on content; 'rtl'/'ltr' forces a direction.

rtlSupport.threshold.description: Minimum ratio of RTL characters (0..1) to trigger RTL direction for a block.

rtlSupport.perBlock.description: Detect direction per text block (recommended for mixed-language messages).

rtlSupport.inputRtl.description: Apply RTL to user input fields when typing RTL languages.

rtlSupport.inlineDetect.description: Isolate inline RTL runs within LTR paragraphs (advanced bidi handling).

rtlSupport.debug.description: Enable debug logging in the console.
